meta_title: Free Online Image Compressor | Reduce Image File Size
meta_description: Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images online instantly. Set target file size in KB or adjust compression ratio. 100% private, browser-based.
subtitle: Reduce file sizes without losing visual quality. Set target file sizes, optimize web assets—all processed securely in your browser.

tool_workspace.description: Upload your file to compress. Set the desired quality level or target file size.

social_presets.description: Optimize images for faster load speeds across various platforms.

how_to.title: How to Compress an Image Online
how_to.step1_text: Select your JPG, PNG, or WebP file. It loads securely in browser execution memory.
how_to.step2_text: Choose either Quality slider compression or enter a Target File Size (KB).
how_to.step3_text: Slide to lower quality or specify the KB limit to reach your desired file size.
how_to.step4_text: Click 'Compress Image' to save the optimized file directly to your downloads.

faq.q1: Will my compressed image look blurry?
faq.a1: No. The compressor optimizes the file structure and metadata to reduce size while keeping visual details sharp.
faq.a2: Absolutely not. The compressor runs client-side in browser memory with total privacy.
faq.a3: Yes! PNG files are optimized using lossless compression or conversion to indexed colors.
